mapper.select: /* 테이블 데이터 조회 library.selectTableData */ SELECT A.LOG_ID , A.TABLE_DATA FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOG_ID = #{logId}

/* 참조 매뉴얼(문서) 목록 조회 library.selectDocList */ SELECT B.DOC_FILE_ID , B.FILE_NAME , B.FILE_PATH , B.FILE_SIZE , B.FILE_TYPE , A.RELATED_PAGES FROM TB_CHAT_REF A INNER JOIN TB_DOC_FILE B ON A.DOC_FILE_ID = B.DOC_FILE_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.LOG_ID = #{logId} ORDER BY A.CHAT_REF_ID

/* 카드 상세 조회 library.selectCardDetail */ SELECT A.CARD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_ID , C.CATEGORY_NM , A.LOG_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.TITLE , A.TAGS , A.PIN_YN , A.ARCHIVE_YN , A.ARCHIVE_DT , A.SORT_ORD , A.SQL_CODE , A.NEW_YN , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , B.Q_CONTENT , B.R_CONTENT , B.TTSQ , D.AGENT_ID , D.AGENT_NM , E.ICON_CLASS_NM , F.COLOR_HEX FROM TB_KNOW_CARD A LEFT JOIN TB_CHAT_LOG B ON A.LOG_ID = B.LOG_ID LEFT JOIN TB_KNOW_CAT C ON A.CATEGORY_ID = C.CATEGORY_ID AND A.USER_ID = C.USER_ID LEFT JOIN TB_AGT D ON B.AGENT_ID = D.AGENT_ID LEFT JOIN TB_ICON E ON D.ICON_ID = E.ICON_ID LEFT JOIN TB_COLOR F ON D.COLOR_ID = F.COLOR_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND A.CARD_ID = #{cardId}

/* 보관된 카드 목록 조회 library.selectArchiveCardList */ SELECT A.CARD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_ID , A.LOG_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.TITLE , A.TAGS , A.PIN_YN , A.ARCHIVE_YN , A.ARCHIVE_DT , A.SORT_ORD , A.SQL_CODE , A.NEW_YN , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , B.Q_CONTENT , B.R_CONTENT , B.TTSQ FROM TB_KNOW_CARD A LEFT JOIN TB_CHAT_LOG B ON A.LOG_ID = B.LOG_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.ARCHIVE_YN = 'Y' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.ARCHIVE_DT DESC

/* 휴지통 카드 목록 조회 library.selectTrashCardList */ SELECT A.CARD_ID , A.USER_ID , A.CATEGORY_ID , A.LOG_ID , A.SVC_TY , A.TITLE , A.TAGS , A.PIN_YN , A.ARCHIVE_YN , A.ARCHIVE_DT , A.SORT_ORD , A.SQL_CODE , A.NEW_YN , A.USE_YN , A.CREATE_DT , A.MODIFY_DT , B.Q_CONTENT , B.R_CONTENT , B.TTSQ FROM TB_KNOW_CARD A LEFT JOIN TB_CHAT_LOG B ON A.LOG_ID = B.LOG_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_YN = 'N' AND A.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY A.MODIFY_DT DESC
/* 차트 통계 속성 목록 조회 library.selectChartStatList */ SELECT A.STAT_ID , A.STAT_NM FROM stat_attr A WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_AT = 'Y'

/* 차트 상세 코드 목록 조회 library.selectChartDetailCdList */ SELECT B.DETAIL_ITEM_CD , B.DETAIL_ITEM_CODE_NM AS DETAIL_ITEM_NM FROM stat_detail_item_grp A LEFT OUTER JOIN stat_detail_item B ON B.DETAIL_ITEM_GRP_ID = A.DETAIL_ITEM_GRP_ID WHERE 1=1 AND A.USE_AT = 'Y' AND B.USE_AT = 'Y'
/* 카드의 질의/응답 본문 조회 library.selectCardChatContent */ SELECT A.Q_CONTENT , A.R_CONTENT FROM TB_CHAT_LOG A INNER JOIN TB_KNOW_CARD B ON A.LOG_ID = B.LOG_ID WHERE 1=1 AND B.CARD_ID = #{cardId}
/* 템플릿 정보 조회 library.selectTmpl */ SELECT A.TMPL_TYPE , A.LLM_PROMPT FROM TB_TMPL A WHERE 1=1 AND A.TMPL_ID = #{tmplId}
/* 템플릿 필드 목록 조회 library.selectTmplFieldList */ SELECT A.JSON_KEY , A.FIELD_NM , A.MULTILINE_YN FROM TB_TMPL_FIELD A WHERE 1=1 AND A.TMPL_ID = #{tmplId} ORDER BY A.SORT_ORD
/* 동일 방의 최신 리포트 채팅 로그 library.selectLastReportChatLog */ SELECT REPORT_DATA AS reportData , IDX_NO AS idxNo FROM TB_REPORT_CHAT_LOG WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} ORDER BY IDX_NO DESC LIMIT 1
